description: CompositionCotton blendFittingComfortWash Care Hand wash or machine wash This sky blue crew neck t-shirt from adidas suits men - young and old - alike. short sleeved with an embossed adidas logo, it's an ideal polo tee for Sports and fitness training at the neighborhood gym or sports club. Pair it with denims for that casual leisurewear look. It's a great add to the wardrobe of college-goers and working folks.
